name: state of limbo
description: I'm in a state of limbo
hints: You're in a state of limbo. There's a sign and a way down.
READ SIGN for information about where you are. DOWN leads back to the starting dome.
DOWN returns to the dome (room 2). This is a transition state - you may arrive here after dying or through warps. READ SIGN.
notes: Limbo state. DOWN leads to the starting dome (room 2). Transition/rebirth room after death or warp. Sign provides information. Connect between death and restart.
